theres no right answer, it depends on whether it clears or not

if u clear with deus ex then theres no issue
"it depends"
generally speaking if u have poison, u want to go all in on poison, because every extra poison applier buffs your poison triggers
and every extra poison trigger buffs your poison appliers
but there are some ways to combine them, like using aurita to trigger faros deep currents 20 times
thats not exactly the same as "focusing on tentacles"
but yea

content: kath is good
Oooh
most characters need dupes to be viable endgame dps
kath is actually one of the cheapest ones
because she needs not much investment other than e3 of herself
you dont need any specific support to go with her
she just solo carries early and midgame
soft pity in this game is 30 pulls so its pretty easy to get dupes

so i was looking through the Mythag Compendium and the New player hand book and i realized that i kinda wasted my luminous cores , i am two days in with all the standard charcters (almost) and got daffodil for 3 times from moonless guide , should i restart cause i wanna build jenkins which seems to require castor.
and i am on normal 3.11 so i can get back preetty quick
does moonless have vortice , cause i also kinda want her
cheri kinda hyped up kaith too so i think i can get her with a new account and using all my resoures to get her
Ahhh this games so big brianed
Is anyone here? pls i need help
Hi guys is Doll Inferno any good? :33

well, you can't really brick an account in this game, at most you'll take a bit longer to transition to endgame, and arc 1 ch3 isn't all that far in so even if you haven't gotten much that you'll use you wouldn't have too many pulls "wasted" anyway, account level matters a lot more  than pull incone for progression so rerolling is usually discouraged.
with regards to jenkin, she used to be used with castor as a relatively cheap way to proc his corrosion, but nowadays with the increased difficulty of a5 dtide that comp is kinda dead and jenkin instead sees use as a crit support.
moonless banner only has arc 1 limited awakeners, vortice is an arc 2 awakener so she isn't on that banner (and the same applies to kath.)

doll inferno is a solid aliemus battery and poison support at e1, people will often mention her OE (8 copies total) to be a very strong power spike for her, but while it is one it's also very expensive for what you get from it and so it's not really recommended anymore.
